scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=3002 npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend -- -p 3010"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
